creator: Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
'fetch' command fail to get some file. Please tell me how to avoid this problem. How-To-Repeat: Do this command fetch http://www.power.co.jp/tm/tanaka/new-osaka.tar.gz and you'll find this message and fail. tm/tanaka/new-osaka.tar.gz fetching failed, header so far: HTTP/1.0 406 óIuWFNg Content-Type: text/html

HTTP/1.0 406 óIuWFNg
